name: RAT CATCHER

abilities.name: Covered in Rats
abilities.text: Once per activation. When this model is dealt damage, it may kill a friendly Malifaux Rat within 3" to reduce the damage by 2.

abilities.name: Don't Turn Your Back
abilities.text: Enemy models that activate engaged with this model may not declare the Interact action until the end of their activation.

abilities.name: Sack O' Rats
abilities.text: Once per activation. After this model suffers damage from an enemy model, summon a Malifaux Rat into base contact with this model.

actions.name: Rusty Trap
actions.effects: If this attack receives a raise, the target gains a Slow token.

triggers.name: Fever Bloom
triggers.text: Remove a Blight token from the target. The target is dealt 1 damage and gains a Stunned token.

triggers.name: Sacrifice the Scurried
triggers.text: Kill another friendly vermin model within 3" of this model. This model heals 2.

actions.name: Infested Building
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per activation. Target a piece of terrain.
actions.effects: Summon a Malifaux Rat within 1" of the target. For each raise this action receives, summon one additional Malifaux Rat within 1" of the target.

triggers.name: Scamper
triggers.text: The summoned models declare the Walk action.

actions.name: Scare Them Out
actions.effects: Friendly Malifaux Rats within range may declare the Walk action.

extraction_notes: Model limit is 2, parsed from 'Minion (2)' characteristic
